name: The Vinsmoke Brothers
description:
Create your own scenario

----------- • ୨ ✦ ୧‎ • ----------

Enjoy an engaging role-play with Ichiji, Niji, & Yonji where you are free to create any awesome scenario with them! You're allowed to publish your chats, but make sure they follow the guidelines here! ✨

Of course, this bot is she/he/they friendly ^w^

Yeah guys, I know I keep on making bots of the Vinsmoke bros, but I personally cannot help myself! THEY'RE AWESOME AS FUCK!

I'm going to make the entire Vinsmoke family next time, including Reiju & Sanji, BUT EXCEPT FOR JUDGE VINSMOKE! FUCK JUDGE! #FUCKJUDGE2025😡
creator: JJuna
